strings:
Luminoth Datapac translated.
(Champions of Aether)
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Defiled Shrine&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Defiled Shrine&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;If you were hoping for a useful hint, then you got the short end of the stick.&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;If you were hoping for a useful hint, then you got the short end of the stick.&pop;
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Accursed Lake&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;key&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Accursed Lake&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;key&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Imagining this hint is left as an exercise to the player.&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Imagining this hint is left as an exercise to the player.&pop;
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Seeker Launcher&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;guarded by a Boss&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Seeker Launcher&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;guarded by a Boss&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Ing Reliquary&pop; contains some &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Chozo technology&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Ing Reliquary&pop; contains some &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Chozo technology&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Long ago, the creatures on Aether lived together in harmony. Then, everything changed when the Ing attacked.&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Long ago, the creatures on Aether lived together in harmony. Then, everything changed when the Ing attacked.&pop;
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Progressive Suit&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Grapple Point&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Progressive Suit&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Grapple Point&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;It's fine to not finish all of your games. After all, if they're not fun, why bother?&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;It's fine to not finish all of your games. After all, if they're not fun, why bother?&pop;
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;translator&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Sandcanyon&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;translator&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Sandcanyon&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;You found me!&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;You found me!&pop;
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;visor&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near an elevator unit&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;visor&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near an elevator unit&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Battleground&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;beam-related upgrade&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Battleground&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;beam-related upgrade&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Your current Chozo Battle Suit version is SA1-4468-VM6-P.&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Your current Chozo Battle Suit version is SA1-4468-VM6-P.&pop;
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Dark Oasis&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Dark Oasis&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Poisoned Bog&pop; contains some &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Chozo technology&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Poisoned Bog&pop; contains some &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Chozo technology&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;visor&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Half-Pipe&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;visor&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Half-Pipe&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Did you know that Bigfoot and Santa Claus exist in the Metroid Prime canon?&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Did you know that Bigfoot and Santa Claus exist in the Metroid Prime canon?&pop;
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Light Beam&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Light Energy Transport&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Light Beam&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Light Energy Transport&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Want a hint? Just go where the items are.&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;Want a hint? Just go where the items are.&pop;
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;translator&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;overtop an Abyss&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;translator&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;overtop an Abyss&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Super Missile&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near exposed Phazon&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Super Missile&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near exposed Phazon&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Dungeon&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Dungeon&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Progressive Suit&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;in a Morph Ball tunnel&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Progressive Suit&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;in a Morph Ball tunnel&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive - Hive Entrance&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Missile Expansion&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive - Hive Entrance&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Missile Expansion&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Storage A&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Storage A&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Violet Translator&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds - Dynamo Chamber&pop;.
The &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Violet Translator&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds - Dynamo Chamber&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive - Hive Dynamo Works&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
The Flying Ing Cache in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive - Hive Dynamo Works&pop; contains a &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;missile-related upgrade&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#45F731;After you're done with your play session, how about going for a little walk?&pop;
&push;&main-color=#45F731;After you're done with your play session, how about going for a little walk?&pop;
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;beam&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Sand Cache&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;beam&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Sand Cache&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Boost Spinner&pop;.
A &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;movement system&pop; can be found &push;&main-color=#FF3333;near a Boost Spinner&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 1&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Bioenergy Production&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 1&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Bioenergy Production&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 2&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Battleground&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 2&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes - Battleground&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 3&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Undertemple Access&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 3&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Undertemple Access&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 4&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Dark Torvus Temple&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 4&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Dark Torvus Temple&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 5&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Great Temple - Transport A Access&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 5&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Great Temple - Transport A Access&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 6&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress - Main Research&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 6&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress - Main Research&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 7&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Undertemple&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 7&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Torvus Bog - Undertemple&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 8&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Accursed Lake&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 8&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sky Temple Grounds - Accursed Lake&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 9&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Storage D&pop;.
&push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Sky Temple Key 9&pop; is located in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Agon Wastes - Storage D&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Dark Agon Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Torvus Bog&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Dark Agon Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Torvus Bog&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Dark Torvus Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Dark Torvus Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Dark Agon Wastes&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Ing Hive&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Hive Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Torvus Bog&pop;.

The keys to &push;&main-color=#FF6705B3;Hive Temple&pop; can be found in &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Sanctuary Fortress&pop;, &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Temple Grounds&pop; and &push;&main-color=#FF3333;Torvus Bog&pop;.
